workflow_contract.source_actions: Workflows may offer connector source/read actions only when command.workflow_source_allowed is true.
workflow_contract.output_destinations: Workflows may offer connector output destinations only when command.workflow_destination_allowed is true and operator service keys can be bound.
workflow_contract.approvals: External mutation commands remain approval-gated when command.approval_required is true.
workflow_contract.credentials: Credential binding must use auth.service_key_provider and command.required_service_keys; local environment fallback is development-only.

readiness_levels.live-ready: Harness and manifest expose non-preview runtime commands; production_smoke_tested still records whether live account smoke evidence exists.
readiness_levels.read-only: Harness and manifest expose read commands but no live write bridge.
readiness_levels.preview-only: Write commands are surfaced only as preview/scaffold behavior or without a live write bridge.
readiness_levels.manifest-only: Connector has manifest metadata but no usable harness evidence in this tree.
readiness_levels.scaffold/deferred: Connector or commands are explicitly scaffold-only/deferred.

caveats: This index is generated from repository evidence, not live external account probes.
production_smoke_tested=false means do not claim production live coverage.
Consumers must still enforce required_mode, permissions, and side-effect approval at runtime.
workflow_destination_allowed=true is metadata eligibility, not proof that operator credentials are currently configured.
